item_text: Our vision is clearly communicated throughout the company.
Our vision is inspiring.
Our vision challenges those who work here to continuously improve.
Our vision is long-term oriented.
Our organization creates value in the community in which it operates.
Our organization builds and maintains quality relationships with all stakeholders.
Our organization considers the needs of the community and society.
Our organization's purpose/mission makes me feel that my work is meaningful.
I am proud to work for this organization.
It is clear to me how my work connects to our broader organizational purpose.
People here have clarity on which decisions fall within their jurisdiction.
People feel trusted and empowered to make decisions that are within their authority.
Our policies and practices are aligned with our strategic objectives.
New organizational processes are rolled out rather seamlessly.
Management are nimble in responding to changes in our market and environment.
Our organization's progress toward strategic objectives is tracked and communicated widely.
People are held accountable to their role in achieving organizational goals.

We treat mistakes as an opportunity for growth.

Even when there is a disagreement, people still show respect for one another.
